_comment: Curated colloquial program names. Each entry maps a phrase to the candidate program codes a current student could plausibly mean. When a phrase appears in the query, its candidate codes override alias scoring: any alias-only matches outside the curated set are dropped (verbatim-typed codes are kept). Add entries when conversation logs surface a recurring informal term that alias scoring can't resolve cleanly.

teknisk fysik.note: Vanligen civilingenjörsprogrammet CTFYS (5 år) eller masterprogrammet TTFYM (2 år). TFEPM (fusionsenergi och teknisk fysik) avvecklades 2010 och tas bara med om användaren skriver koden eller "fusionsenergi" uttryckligen.

engineering physics.note: Usually the 5-year civilingenjör (CTFYS) or the 2-year master (TTFYM). TFEPM (nuclear fusion science and engineering physics) was discontinued in 2010.

teknisk matematik.note: Civilingenjörsprogrammet i teknisk matematik (CTMAT). Utan denna override drog alias-scoring in TMTHM (masterprogram, matematik — sista intag 2012) som spurious candidate, eftersom dess enda strong-token "matematik" matchade fullt ut.
